content: Mobile money webhooks (M-Pesa/PaySuite) are at-least-once delivery and retried on timeout, causing duplicate-credit risk if not deduplicated. Fix: persist provider transaction/reference IDs, use idempotency keys tied to that ID before crediting wallet, respond 200 fast and process async, never trust client-reported payment success -- wait for signed webhook or server-side status poll as source of truth.
